mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_records (user_id, rfid_tag, borrow_date, due_date, renew_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{rfidTag}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{renewCount})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND return_date IS NULL
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE rfid_tag = #{rfidTag} AND return_date IS NULL
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE return_date IS NULL AND due_date < NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_records SET user_id = #{userId}, is_p2p_transfer = 1, transfer_from_user_id = #{transferFromUserId}, borrow_date = NOW(), due_date = #{dueDate}, renew_count = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND return_date IS NULL
